name: Gable
description: Rows of little houses raising their roofs — every redraw rebuilds the street with new heights, hues and roof pitches.

code.style: --house: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); --roof: @p(var(--color5), var(--color5), var(--color1), var(--color2)); --rule: ( /* walls and roof share one emitted height so the roof always sits on the ridge */ --hh: @r(26, 54); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 16%; width: 68%; top: calc(100% - @var(--hh) * 1%); height: calc(@var(--hh) * 1%); background: var(--house); transition: ease 600ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 16%; width: 68%; bottom: calc(@var(--hh) * 1%); height: 26%; background: var(--roof); clip-path: polygon(@rand(38%, 62%) 0%, 100% 100%, 0% 100%); transition: ease 600ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
